7 
8 #pragma once
9 
10 #pragma pack(push)
11 #pragma pack(1)
12 
14 // Magewell USB Capture Extensions
15 
16 enum _MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION {
17  // Product informations (General)
18  MWCAP_HID_CHANNEL_INFO = 1, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_CHANNEL_INFO
19  MWCAP_HID_FAMILY_INFO, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_USB_CAPTURE_INFO
20 
21  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CAPS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_CAPS
22  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_CAPS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_CAPS
23 
24  // Device controls (General)
25  MWCAP_HID_LED_MODE, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
26  MWCAP_HID_POST_RECONFIG, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
27 
28  // Notification (General)
29  MWCAP_HID_NOTIFY_ENABLE, // S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_NOTIFY_ENABLE
30  MWCAP_HID_NOITFY_STATUS, // G, Data: uint8_t, uint64_t
31 
32  // Input source (General)
33  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY
34  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY
35 
36  MWCAP_HID_INPUT_SOURCE_SCAN, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
37  MWCAP_HID_INPUT_SOURCE_SCAN_STATE, // G, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
38  MWCAP_HID_AV_INPUT_SOURCE_LINK, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
39  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_INPUT_SOURCE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
40  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_INPUT_SOURCE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
41 
42  // Signal status (General)
43  MWCAP_HID_INPUT_SPECIFIC_STATUS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_INPUT_SPECIFIC_STATUS
44  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_SIGNAL_STATUS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_SIGNAL_STATUS
45  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS
46 
47  // Video processing (General)
48  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_INPUT_ASPECT_RATIO, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_ASPECT_RATIO
49  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_INPUT_COLOR_FORMAT, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
50  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_INPUT_QUANTIZATION_RANGE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
51 
52  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CAPTURE_CONNECTION_FORMAT, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_CONNECTION_FORMAT
53  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CAPTURE_PROCESS_SETTINGS, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_PROCESS_SETTINGS
54 
55  // Video output formats (General)
56  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC
57  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE
58  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL
59  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_DEVICE_DISABLE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_DEVICE_DISABLE
60 
61  // UART control (UART)
62  MWCAP_HID_UART_OPEN = 0x50, // S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_UART_OPEN
63  MWCAP_HID_UART_CLOSE, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
64  MWCAP_HID_UART_DATA, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_UART_DATA
65  MWCAP_HID_UART_STATUS, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_UART_STATUS
66 
67  // Miscs
68  MWCAP_HID_CORE_TEMPERATURE = 0x58, // G, Data: uint8_t, int32_t (in 0.1 deg C)
69  MWCAP_HID_GPIO_IN, // G, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
70  MWCAP_HID_GPIO_OUT_SET, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
71  MWCAP_HID_GPIO_OUT_CLR, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
72  MWCAP_HID_QUERY_STATUS, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
73  MWCAP_HID_USB_SPEED_SEL, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t[8]
74 
75  // VGA/Component timings (Timing) (0x90 - 0x99)
76  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_AUTO_H_ALIGN = 0x90, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
77  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_SAMPLING_PHASE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t (0-31, 255 triger auto adjust once)
78  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_SAMPLING_PHASE_AUTO, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
79  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_TIMING, // S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING
80  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_PREFERRED_TIMING_ARRAY, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING_ARRAY
81  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING, // S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING
82  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_ARRAY, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_ARRAY
83  MWCAP_HID_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_ARRAY, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_ARRAY
84 
85  // HDMI related (HDMI) (0x9A - 0x9F)
86  MWCAP_HID_EDID, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t[256]
87  MWCAP_HID_EDID_LOOP_THROUGH, // G, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t[256]
88  MWCAP_HID_EDID_MODE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
89 
90  MWCAP_HID_LOOP_THROUGH, // G, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
91 
92  // HDMI status (HDMI) (0xA0 - 0xB0)
93  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_VALID = 0xA0, // G, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
94  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_AVI, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
95  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_AUDIO, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
96  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_SPD, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
97  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_MS, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
98  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_VS, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
99  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_ACP, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
100  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_ISRC1, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
101  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_ISRC2, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
102  MWCAP_HID_HDMI_INFOFRAME_GAMUT, // G, Data: uint8_t, HDMI_INFOFRAME_PACKET
103 
104  // Audio volumes (Volume) (0xB0 - 0xC0)
105  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_MICROPHONE = 0xB0, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
106  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_HEADPHONE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
107  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_LINE_IN, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
108  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_LINE_OUT, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
109  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
110  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
111  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_USB_CAPTURE, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
112  MWCAP_HID_AUDIO_VOLUME_USB_PLAYBACK, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME
113 
114  // Reserved (0xC0 - 0xD0)
115 
116  // Reserved for future (0xD0 - 0xE0)
117 
118  // Firmware upgrade (General)
119  MWCAP_HID_FIRMWARE_STORAGE = 0xF0, // G, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE
120  MWCAP_HID_FIRMWARE_ERASE, // S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_FIRMWARE_ERASE
121  MWCAP_HID_FIRMWARE_READ_ADDRESS, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
122  MWCAP_HID_FIRMWARE_DATA, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_FIRMWARE_DATA
123  MWCAP_HID_FIRMWARE_WIP, // G, Data: uint8_t, bool_t
124 
125  // Options
126  MWCAP_HID_STATUS_IMAGE_ADDR = 0xFA, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_ADDR
127  MWCAP_HID_STATUS_IMAGE_DATA = 0xFB, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_DATA
128  MWCAP_HID_STATUS_IMAGE_MODE = 0xFC, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
129  MWCAP_HID_DEVICE_NAME_MODE = 0xFD, // G/S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
130  MWCAP_HID_OPTIONS_CONTROL = 0xFE, // S, Data: uint8_t, uint8_t
131 
132  // Extension sets supported (General)
133  MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_SUPPORTED = 0xFF // G, Data: uint8_t, uint32_t
134 };
136 // Data structs
137 
138 // USB additional capabilities
139 #define MWCAP_USB_VIDEO_CAP_HDMI_LOOP_THROUGH 0x00000001
140 #define MWCAP_USB_VIDEO_CAP_SDI_LOOP_THROUGH 0x00000002
141 #define MWCAP_USB_VIDEO_CAP_PLANAR_FORMAT 0x00000004
142 
143 enum _MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_NODE {
144  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_MICROPHONE,
145  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_HEADPHONE,
146  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_IN,
147  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_OUT,
148  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE,
149  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK,
150  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_CAPTURE,
151  MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_PLAYBACK
152 };
153 
154 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_MICROPHONE (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_MICROPHONE)
155 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_HEADPHONE (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_HEADPHONE)
156 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_LINE_IN (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_IN)
157 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_LINE_OUT (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_OUT)
158 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE)
159 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK)
160 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_USB_CAPTURE (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_CAPTURE)
161 #define MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_CAP_USB_PLAYBACK (1 << MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_PLAYBACK)
162 
163 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_CONNECTION_FORMAT_CHANGED 0x20000ULL
164 
165 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_MICROPHONE (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_MICROPHONE))
166 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_HEADPHONE (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_HEADPHONE))
167 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_LINE_IN (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_IN))
168 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_LINE_OUT (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_LINE_OUT))
169 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_CAPTURE))
170 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_EMBEDDED_PLAYBACK))
171 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_USB_CAPTURE (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_CAPTURE))
172 #define MWCAP_NOTIFY_VOLUME_USB_PLAYBACK (1ULL << (48 + MWCAP_USB_AUDIO_USB_PLAYBACK))
173 
174 enum _MWCAP_USB_SPEED_TYPE {
175  MWCAP_USB_FULL_SPEED = 0x01,
176  MWCAP_USB_HIGH_SPEED = 0x02,
177  MWCAP_USB_SUPER_SPEED_GEN1 = 0x03,
178  MWCAP_USB_SUPER_SPEED_GEN2 = 0x04
179 };
180 
181 // MWCAP_HID_STATUS_IMAGE_MODE
182 enum _MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_MODE {
183  MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_DEFAULT,
184  MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_BLUE,
185  MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_BLACK,
186  MWCAP_STATUS_IMAGE_CUSTOM
187 };
188 
189 // MWCAP_HID_DEVICE_NAME_MODE
190 enum _MWCAP_DEVICE_NAME_MODE {
191  MWCAP_DEVICE_NAME_DEFAULT,
192  MWCAP_DEVICE_NAME_SERIAL_NUMBER,
193  MWCAP_DEVICE_NAME_CUSTOM
194 };
195 
196 //MWCAP_PRODUCT_ID_USB_CAPTURE_HDMI_4K_PRO the cost of changing device name was increased from 1 byte to 31 byte
197 #define MW_DEVICE_NAME_LENGTH 31
198 //an extra 1 byte represents mode MW_DEVICE_NAME_LENGTH
199 #define MW_DEVICE_NAME_MODE_LENGTH 32
200 
201 typedef struct _MWCAP_AUDIO_DEVICE_DISABLE {
202  uint8_t byDevEnable;
203  uint8_t byDevDisable;
204 } MWCAP_AUDIO_DEVICE_DISABLE;
205 
206 // MWCAP_HID_OPTIONS_CONTROL
207 enum _MWCAP_OPTIONS_CONTROL {
208  MWCAP_OPTIONS_RESET, // Reset options to default value
209  MWCAP_OPTIONS_LOAD, // Load from flash/eeprom storage
210  MWCAP_OPTIONS_SAVE // Save to flash/eeprom storage
211 };
212 
213 // MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_SET
214 #define MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_HDMI 0x00000001
215 #define MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_TIMING 0x00000002
216 #define MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_VOLUME 0x00000004
217 #define MWCAP_HID_EXTENSION_UART 0x00000008
218 
219 // Basic types
220 typedef int8_t bool_t;
221 
222 typedef struct _MWSIZE {
223  int16_t cx;
224  int16_t cy;
225 } MWSIZE;
226 
227 typedef struct _MWRECT {
228  int16_t left;
229  int16_t top;
230  int16_t right;
231  int16_t bottom;
232 } MWRECT;
233 
241 typedef struct _MWCAP_USB_CAPTURE_INFO {
242  uint8_t byUSBSpeed;
243  uint8_t byBoardIndex;
244  uint32_t cbTotalMemorySize;
245  uint32_t cbFreeMemorySize;
246 } MWCAP_USB_CAPTURE_INFO;
247 
248 typedef struct _MWCAP_NOTIFY_ENABLE {
249  bool_t bInterrupt;
250  uint64_t ullEnableBits;
251 } MWCAP_NOTIFY_ENABLE;
252 
259 typedef struct _MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE_USB{
260  DWORD cbStorage;
261  DWORD cbEraseBlock;
262  DWORD cbProgramBlock;
263  DWORD cbHeaderOffset;
264 
265  DWORD cbFirmwareOffset;
266  DWORD cbDriverOffset;
267  DWORD cbMRFSOffset;
268 }MWCAP_FIRMWARE_STORAGE_USB;
269 
270 typedef struct _MWCAP_FIRMWARE_DATA {
271  uint32_t dwAddress; // Must write in a 256 page
272  uint16_t cbData;
273  uint8_t abyData[256];
274 } MWCAP_FIRMWARE_DATA;
275 
276 // Input source
277 typedef struct _MWCAP_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY {
278  uint8_t byNumInputSource;
279  uint32_t adwInputSources[16];
280 } MWCAP_INPUT_SOURCE_ARRAY;
281 
282 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING_ARRAY {
283  uint8_t byNumTimings;
284  MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING aTimings[8];
285 } MWCAP_VIDEO_TIMING_ARRAY;
286 
287 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_ARRAY {
288  uint8_t byNumCustomTimings;
289  MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING aCustomTimings[8];
290 } MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_TIMING_ARRAY;
291 
292 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_ARRAY {
293  uint8_t byNumCustomResolutions;
294  MWSIZE aCustomResolutions[16];
295 } MWCAP_VIDEO_CUSTOM_RESOLUTION_ARRAY;
296 
297 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_AUDIO_CHANNEL 16
298 
299 typedef struct _MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME {
300  uint8_t byChannels;
301  uint8_t byReserved;
302  int16_t sVolumeMin;
303  int16_t sVolumeMax;
304  int16_t sVolumeStep;
305 
306  bool_t abMute[MWCAP_MAX_NUM_AUDIO_CHANNEL];
307  int16_t asVolume[MWCAP_MAX_NUM_AUDIO_CHANNEL];
308 } MWCAP_AUDIO_VOLUME;
309 
310 
311 
312 
313 
314 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC 3
315 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE 24
316 #define MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL 8
317 
318 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC {
319  uint8_t byCount;
320  uint32_t adwFOURCCs[MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC];
321 } MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FOURCC;
322 
323 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE {
324  uint8_t byCount;
325  uint8_t byDefault;
326  MWSIZE aSizes[MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE];
327 } MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_SIZE;
328 
329 typedef struct _MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL {
330  uint8_t byCount;
331  uint8_t byDefault;
332  uint32_t adwIntervals[MWCAP_MAX_NUM_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL];
333 } MWCAP_VIDEO_OUTPUT_FRAME_INTERVAL;
334 
335 typedef struct _MWCAP_UART_OPEN {
336  uint32_t dwBaudrate;
337  uint8_t byStopBitLen;
338  uint8_t byParityCheck;
339  uint8_t byBitCount;
340 } MWCAP_UART_OPEN;
341 
342 typedef struct _MWCAP_UART_STATUS {
343  uint8_t bRxOverflow;
344  uint8_t byTxCount;
345  uint8_t byRxCount;
346 } MWCAP_UART_STATUS;
347 
348 typedef struct _MWCAP_UART_DATA {
349  uint8_t bRxParityError;
350  uint8_t bRxOverflow;
351  uint8_t cbData;
352  uint8_t abyData[128];
353 } MWCAP_UART_DATA;
354
